This strategic decision will see a notable rise in product availability across various retail outlets, thereby increasing consumer accessibility and overall market penetration.

data.title: French quantum computing company, Quobly, opens Canadian subsidiary in Quebec to strengthen research capabilities.
data.description: On January 30, 2026, Quobly, a leading French company specializing in silicon-based quantum computing, revealed the establishment of its Canadian branch in Sherbrooke, Quebec. This move is intended to enhance the company's research capabilities and marks a strategic expansion for Quobly.
